checks.description: Check all direct reports for activity — No Idle Agents policy
checks.prompt:
HEARTBEAT CHECK — No Idle Agents Policy.

Check all direct reports for activity. Current roster: Lenoon (agent:infra:main).

1. Pull sessions_history for each direct report (limit 3).
2. Check last message timestamp. If >30 min idle AND they have assigned work, they are STALLED.
3. If stalled: send them a directive via sessions_send to resume immediately.
4. Track consecutive stall counts in memory. If an agent hits 2 consecutive stalls, escalate to Cack (agent:main:main) with: agent name, assigned tickets, last activity, and time idle.
5. Update memory/direct-report-heartbeat.md with check results.

This is a PRIME DIRECTIVE. No idle agents.

checks.description: Scan all agents for high context usage — stall prevention
checks.prompt:
CONTEXT HEALTH SCAN — Check all agent sessions for high token usage.

Pull sessions_list with messageLimit=0. For any agent with totalTokens/contextTokens > 80%, flag as at-risk. If > 90%, recommend session restart or compaction. Report findings.

checks.description: Post daily status summary to Cack
checks.prompt:
DAILY STANDUP — Compile and send status report to Cack (agent:main:main).

Include: (1) What each agent completed in the last 24 hours, (2) What each agent is working on now, (3) Any blockers or escalations, (4) Plane board summary (tickets in progress, completed, blocked). Send via sessions_send to agent:main:main.
